values.name: query
values.value: SELECT * FROM crm_events WHERE entity_id = $1 AND event_type = $2 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

values.name: query
values.value: UPDATE crm_entities SET last_updated = NOW(), processed_by_workflow = $1 WHERE id = $2

values.name: query
values.value: INSERT INTO workflow_executions (workflow_id, execution_id, status, data, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW())
